feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Secret Identities
entry.content: I never understood how for decades it was a written rule that vigilantes required secret identities to prevent reprisals against their loved ones. Yet, in the MCU, Tony Stark, Bruce Banner, Elliot Rodgers are all public figures. Yet no one thinks to kidnap Pepper or anything. Which then gets contradicted by Peter Parker's trilogy-wide plot revolving about his secret identity being leaked. How does this shit work?!

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Time to finally watch this kino from 2013

entry.content: whats the coast you ever tossed on a coin loss ?

entry.title: /int/ International: >Women in Switzerland gained the right to vote in federal elections after a refe…
entry.content: >Women in Switzerland gained the right to vote in federal elections after a referendum in February 1971. The first federal vote in which women were able to participate was the 31 October 1971 election of the Federal Assembly. However it was not until a 1990 decision by the Federal Supreme Court of Switzerland that women gained full voting rights in the final Swiss canton of Appenzell Innerrhoden. Why did they wait so long(compared with other Western countries) to grant women the right to vote?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Actual Hot Take on RPGs
entry.content: Any game that emulates pen'n'paper RPG mechanics is fucking shit and lazy. Seriously. ANY game with top down view and randomized RPG garbage sucks dick. The reason pen'n'paper RPGs exist and have mechanics like that is because you CAN NOT reliably cast a fireball or swing a sword or come up with a clever response in real life that your character would. But in a virtual, computer generated world YOU CAN. You can have your character cast an actual fireball and hit the enemies, you can swing your s

entry.content: What changes do you want to see to fix this old gem?

Very fucking bad experience for English speaking people in general and people overall honestly it's just an ugly clunky society with no real freedom or flexibility

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Foids write thousands of love letters to mass murderer in prison, go on national…
entry.content: Foids write thousands of love letters to mass murderer in prison, go on national TV to forgive someone who killed their husbands, fall in love with their rapist, defend immigrants who rape their children en masse. But the moment a moderately attractive man is too shy to ask them out (they would reject him anyway)? ICK ICK ICK that went too far he's a horrible person who deserves suicide. Why are foidcels so evil?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: In days of yore I took multiple player characters through the first three hubs o…
entry.content: In days of yore I took multiple player characters through the first three hubs of VTMB, but I'd played it to completion only once. Last week, after more than a decade, I got the urge to dust off this janky old game and press all the way to the end with a Nosferatu (male). I had fun role-playing the quests as a festering sewer monster, but sadly, even with the latest patch and restoration content, the endgame was just as awful as I recalled. AGAIN I had to use godmode to get past Ming Xiao. My No

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I have had some experiences which I can only explain as metaphysical, so I belie…
entry.content: I have had some experiences which I can only explain as metaphysical, so I believe in the afterlife. However, I am also I would say a logical person, I don't discredit material events for what they are. Because of this I am keenly aware many of my mind's aspect seem to be chemical and biological, given they can be influenced by even petty elements like the environment or how much water I drank. So it seems to be obvious to me my mind cannot exist as it is in the afterlife. There wouldn't be this

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: check out this nigger
/g/ Technology: Got a job as a field service technician while pretending to have a car. Currentl…
entry.content: Got a job as a field service technician while pretending to have a car. Currently I'm being trained so a colleague is driving me around while I watch he working. I don't even know how I'm supposed to walk around the city using public transport in rush hours with a bunch of boxes filled with computer parts. Do you think I'll be able to last at least a month to get some money? I'm already owing money to my mom. Anyone did something similar?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >everyone is going to abandon frontier models and agent harnesses so that they c…
entry.content: >everyone is going to abandon frontier models and agent harnesses so that they can save a few bucks on tokens Not sure what's with this Chinese propaganda. You don't see companies hosting on some chink cloud, or buying their employees Xiaomi phones. The West generally cares about reliability and SLAs and you don't get that with chinktech. The CCP has been running a surveillance state for decades now and despite having a camera on my every street corner, they never figured out LLMs, transformers,

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: System Shock
entry.content: Just finished system shock for the first time. Ace game, I highly recommend it. I didn't think much of it at first, but then got really hooked on it at research level. I think I'm going to replay it on the higher difficulty settings.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Troubleshooting
entry.content: I've purchased a Honda CX500, and been working it for about a month ish now. Only problem was the throttle lagged, which I tried to fix by cleaning pilot valve. I also took the tank off because there was bad gas in it, but it ran fine otherwise before that. Cleaned that tank, new gas, fuel line, and carb clean with the float bowl off. (Prev owner JB welded it) Went to start it up, and would only go with choke fully in. After a bit of starter fluid, it would run consistently, but due as soon as t

entry.title: /g/ Technology: This is the best laptop I've ever had, holy shit. A true marvel of design, batte…
entry.content: This is the best laptop I've ever had, holy shit. A true marvel of design, battery life and screen. Plus macOS is a very capable unix for working on projects. Why is /g/ always wrong when it comes to tech?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 1972 Pontiac Catalina refresh
entry.content: How far should I go with this? I want to do everything in my garage. No outsourcing, i had the wheels powder coated, but thats it thus far. I have new body mounts installed. New bushings on all the control arms, i have new brake lines to install, a new chassis harness. Im indecisive how much painting and stuff i should do. Or if i should just start reassembling and worry about doing a frame off restoration later. Go with the beater look for awhile. Its surprisingly well kept. The dry dust layers

entry.title: /int/ International: The absolute BULLSHIT with aliens is that their anatomy matches humans in every …
entry.content: The absolute BULLSHIT with aliens is that their anatomy matches humans in every single "leak". So what? Is it just coincidence they have 4 limbs, 2 eyes and mouth all located the in the same place as humans. Wouldn't they have a completely different evolutionary timeline? They'd look nothing like us whatsoever if they evolved from a completely different spectrum of fauna. This implies either our structure is the optimal build for an advanced species or evolution works the exact same on every gol

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Les Miserables
entry.content: I just finished reading the novel. I enjoyed it, even though I found it to be a bit too sentimental for me. The plot was also a bit shaky, with characters bumping into each other at extremely convenient times. What's your favourite film adaptation of the novel?

entry.title: /int/ International: I keep getting clocked as Southern European by everyone I meet One guy said I lo…
entry.content: I keep getting clocked as Southern European by everyone I meet One guy said I look like a legionary Today it happened again, a random Chinese guy at the bar tried to guess where I am from and he was just 200km from it I will always remember in school this girl said "of course he gets maximum grade in Latin he looks like a Roman" Are you as Southern Euro as me ? I think few people are

entry.title: /int/ International: Niger became in the first country that banned Incelism
entry.content: Incelbros… >In 2025-2026, Niger's military government (through the Charter of Refoundation and the new Penal Code) included ASEXUALITY in a broad law against “LGBTQIA+ practices” and “acts against nature.” Specifically, Article 390 punishes the participation in or attempt of “indecent acts, acts against nature, or any Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, Queer, Intersex, ASEXUAL (LGBTQIA+) practices” with imprisonment of 5 to 10 years and very high fines (up to the equivalent of approximately US

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Is B a good score by Christgau? The review seemed more harsh than the score
entry.content: >The Fragile [Nothing, 1999] >After six fucking years, genius-by-acclamation Trent Reznor delivers double-hoohah, every second remixed till it glistens like broken glass on a prison wall. Is the way he takes his petty pain out on the world a little, er, immature for a guy who's pushing 35? Never mind, I'm told--just immerse in the music. So I do. "Dream job: emperor," it says. "More fun than death by injection." B

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: My Catholic cope
entry.content: Yes, it is a sin to have any sexual thoughts or feelings on purpose about anyone or anything, except your spouse. People who are not married cannot purposely have any sexual thoughts or feelings at all about anyone or anything for their entire lives. As Jesus said, "If you look at a woman with lust, you have committed adultery in your heart." That is what Jesus said, and that is what the Catholic Church teaches. You must go your entire life without ever willfully having any sexual thoughts or fe
